creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:48:33 2014
New Revision: 352890
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352890
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352890/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189258
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-File-Rsync/Makefile

Modified: head/net/p5-File-Rsync/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-File-Rsync/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:28 2014	(r352889)
+++ head/net/p5-File-Rsync/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:33 2014	(r352890)
@@ -7,11 +7,14 @@ CATEGORIES=	net perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl convenience wrapper for the rsync(1) program
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rsync:${PORTSDIR}/net/rsync
-BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	rsync:${PORTSDIR}/net/rsync
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
